The '''Fourth Battle of Mobetta''' was a space battle surrounding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]-aided [[Airam (group)|Airam]] retreat from [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 factory]] ''[[Gallofree]]'' under fire from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] strike force.

==The Battle==
Not long after the successful [[Ambush in the Derilyn system]], the Rebel Alliance received a distress call from the Airam factory ''[[Gallofree]]'', where the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']] had been [[Modified Strike Cruiser|refitted]].

[[File:Compellor_before_explosion.jpg|left|thumb|[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class stormtrooper transport]] trying to board the interdictor ''[[Compellor]]'' just before its self-destruction.]]
The gutted ex-Imperial [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'', left behind by the Rebels as planned, detonated in full view of the Imperial strike team as the elements of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn|Senn's]] [[Task Force Vengeance]] approached the factory. The Imperial battle group then moved in to retaliate against the factory personnel.

[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadrons]], along with three [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|Gallofree medium transports]] of Rescue Group, jumped into the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]] to evacuate the Airam from the factory before it was destroyed. What greeted them was a significant Imperial force, consisting of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyers]] [[Juggernaut (Star Destroyer)|''Juggernaut'']] and [[Titan (Imperial-class)|''Titan'']], as well as three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvettes]], all moving in alongside their substantial fighter screens to destroy the factory.

Green Squadron quickly destroyed the spearheading corvettes with a [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]] volley while Rogue Squadron dispatched the incoming bombers. However, the nimble Imperial fighters quickly closed to range with the Rogue [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], and the Rogues got caught up in heavy dogfights with the elite Imperial [[Avenger Squadron]] and several [[Flight group/Legends|flight groups]] of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] craft.

Despite an overwhelming assault by the marauding fleet, both the Rogues and Greens managed to hold off the Imperial TIE starfighters long enough for the transports to complete their mission. After the last transport made the jump to hyperspace, all Rebel fighters followed suit, leaving two slightly damaged Star Destroyers and the abandoned space factory behind.

==Aftermath==
While technically a loss for both the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] (despite the heavy fighter losses on the Imperial side), this battle heavily improved relations between Airam clan leader [[Tamaron]] and the Alliance. Tamaron agreed to deliver a large payload of warheads to the Alliance's sector fleet, which led to the [[Mission to Kuras Drift]].

==Appearances==
